commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 17:15 And next to him was Jehohanan the captain, and with him two hundred and fourscore thousand. Douay Rheims 1609 But the (b) Excesses were left in Israel: Nevertheless the heart of Asa was perfect all his days. (b) King Asa destroyed the places where Idols were served, Chapter 14. but tolerated the places where some offered sacrifice to God beside the proper altar in Jerusalem, because this was dispensable and not the other.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
